items.title: Private Parties
items.description:
Perfect for birthdays, engagements, and garden parties. 
Elevate your celebration and make TM memories..
inclusions: Margaritas mixed with Kombucha & Kefir water
Includes insurances and Occasional license. Application times can vary from council to council. For example Glasgow Council - 7 weeks. East Dunbartonshire - 4 weeks prior to event.
Non-alcoholic sodas can be made available

items.title: Corporate Events
items.description: Impress clients or treat your team. A TM service tailored to your business event.

items.title: Festivals & Pop‑ups
items.description: The ultimate crowd-pleaser. Fast-paced service for high footfall environments without compromising on quality.
